title: Mental Model / Cognitive Bias
description: Schema for mental models and cognitive biases

name.description: Human-readable name of the mental model or cognitive bias

quick_introduction.description: A brief introduction to the topic

in_more_detail.description: A more detailed explanation of the concept

when_to_use.description: Tags indicating when this concept applies (e.g., decision-making, investing, career moves, risk assessment)

how_can_you_spot_it.description: Subsections describing how to recognize this bias or model in practice

examples.description: Real-world examples; each key is an example name, value is the description

real_world_implications.description: Impact in real-world contexts; can be a single string or subsections

professional_application.description: How to apply this in professional settings

how_can_this_be_misapplied.description: Ways this concept can be misused or lead to negative outcomes

related_content.description: List of related mental models or cognitive biases (by id)

one_liner.description: Memorable short phrase to recall the concept (e.g. 'Losses feel ~2x worse than gains')

try_this.description: 2-3 actionable prompts the user can try

ask_yourself.description: Reflection questions to apply the concept
